body.title: Create library Postgres schema — Librarian-managed namespace
body.result: created library schema with library.knowledge table; migration verified
body.intention: I intend that library exists as a Postgres schema where the Librarian deposits curated distilled knowledge, separate from operational devlab data.
body.description:
Curated knowledge (patterns, distilled learnings, cross-project abstractions) has no home — it pollutes clan. The library schema establishes the correct namespace.

Create schema library in Igor-wild-0001 Postgres. Initial table: library.knowledge (id, title, content, domain, tags jsonb, source_ref, curated_at, updated_at). The Librarian is the sole writer; agents query via MCP tool.

**Affected files:** new SQL migration file
**Design rules:** no SQLite; external state; Postgres only
**Scope boundary:** IN — CREATE SCHEMA library; CREATE TABLE library.knowledge. OUT — Librarian writer integration; migrating existing knowledge from clan.
**Completion criteria:** SELECT schema_name FROM information_schema.schemata WHERE schema_name = library returns library; library.knowledge table exists with correct columns.
